title: Mediterranean Bliss Chicken Stock
description: A sweet and creamy mediterranean dish featuring chicken stock concentrate, dill, lemon juice, and gluten-free-friendly dum for a crowd-pleaser.

ingredients.name: 30g gluten-free dum
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is safe to eat as a gluten-free item in your area.

instructions: Boil 8 cups of water with the Chicken Stock Concentrate packet for about 5 minutes.
Add juiced lemons and sliced pickled dill to the boiling stock, stir gently.
Reduce heat and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Stir in gluten-free dum as per package instructions. Simmer for another 2-3 minutes or until dum is heated through.
